messages: Hi OMAR, we would love to stay in your place
I want to ask you about the reservation
مرحبا.. سنصل للموقع عند الساعة 1 ظهراً تقريباً
مرحبا عمر.. ايش المبلغ المطلوب دفعه؟
Done! :) I hope you are having a wonderful night.
Will send them on Sunday when we have access to a scanner.

I completely forgot I'm so sorry. But here they are
 Looking forward to the trip!
Hi! The passports should be in the chat above your message.
We checked in and everything is well. Thank you!

Good morning! The apartment is fantastic and we had a great rest last night!

My sister was wondering if there's a hairdryer in the apartment? We were not able to locate one. If there's none that's fine too.

We had a great time staying here, it was very convenient.

The apartment is so spacious and cozy. If you'd allow us to have some comment, there is a water leakage across the bathroom especially with the the showerhead and the tub, which leads to slippery puddles inside the bathroom. It didn't take away a lot from the experience though.

We left the apartment around 530pm today! My uncle and his wife are visiting Egypt this month. Does the Bouqitue happen to have a one bedroom apartment? If so would you kindly send us a link. 

Thank you for your hospitality and cooperation. We had a great time here!
I'll show my family this! Have a good night. Thank you again and will definitely revisit/tell our family members about this.

Hey Omar! 

Have we left a leather jacket at the place? My dad just unpacked and we are missing it.

If you would kindly have a look and let us know!
What’s the password for the door
Is there hot water for shower
I tried the shower in the main bedroom. It’s cold
Is there hot shower in all rooms or only one room?
